info.name: Yareema Data Hub — Combined API
info.description: Complete API collection for Yareema Data Hub VTU platform. Merges all 4 previous collections with corrected URLs. Key fixes applied: /agent/ (not /agents/), /auth/set-pin (not /auth/set-transaction-pin), notification admin routes under /notifications/admin/.

request.description: Set transaction PIN. Correct endpoint is /set-pin (not /set-transaction-pin).
Get virtual bank account(s) for wallet funding via bank transfer
Returns all 8 Alpha caller credit plans (IDs 9-16, ₦600–₦4150, all 30 days)
Returns all 15 Kirani call-minute plans (IDs 1-15, 30–900 mins, ₦520–₦13850, all 30 days)

Purchase Kirani call minutes. planid: 6=30min(₦520), 12=50min, 7=70min, 1=100min, 13=150min, 2=200min, 14=250min, 3=300min, 15=350min, 4=400min, 5=500min, 8=600min, 9=700min, 10=800min, 11=900min(₦13850)
Get list of electricity distribution companies (DISCOs) available for bill payment
Cancel electricity transaction (ORDER_RECEIVED or ORDER_ONHOLD status only)
Correct URL: /notifications/admin/broadcast (not /admin/broadcast)
Correct URL: /notifications/admin/send (not /admin/notifications/:userId/send)

item.name: Agent System
item.description: IMPORTANT: All agent routes use /api/v1/agent/ (singular), not /api/v1/agents/ (plural).

request.description: Admin/super_admin only. Revenue, wallet stats, daily breakdown.
Admin/super_admin/staff only. User growth and KYC stats.
Admin/super_admin only. Agent commission and performance stats.
Admin/super_admin/staff only. Transactions by service type/provider.

item.name: Webhooks
item.description: Webhook endpoints for payment processors and VTU providers

request.description: List all gift card categories from Prestmit
List gift card products. Filter by category or country.
Get details for a specific gift card product
Buy a gift card. amountNgn = NGN to debit from wallet. value = USD/product currency face value.
List all gift card orders
Get a specific gift card order
Check Prestmit platform wallet balance. Admin only.
List all Zendit brands
List Zendit voucher products. Filter by brand or country.
Get a specific Zendit voucher product
Buy via Zendit. FIXED offers: omit value. RANGE offers: provide value between min/max. amountNgn = NGN wallet debit.
Check a Zendit purchase status by transactionId
Search airports by name or IATA code (Tiqwa; also usable for Duffel IATA lookup)
Search international flights. Returns searchId + embedded offers. origin/destination = IATA airport codes.
Paginate offers for a search. sort: total_amount or total_duration.
Refresh price + available add-ons for an offer before booking.
Book a flight. passenger.id comes from the offer response. amountNgn = NGN to charge the user.
List international flight bookings
Get full booking with e-ticket documents and payment status
Get a cancellation quote with refund amount. Returns cancellationId.
Confirm and execute the cancellation. Triggers refund to Duffel balance.
List domestic airlines (Air Peace, Ibom Air, etc.)
Search domestic Nigerian flights. IATA: LOS=Lagos, ABV=Abuja, KAN=Kano, PHC=Port Harcourt, ENE=Enugu, ILR=Ilorin, QOW=Owerri.
Book domestic flight. amountNgn = NGN to debit from wallet.
Get domestic booking details
Cancel a domestic flight booking
